publishDecision.summary: OpenAI Plans to Launch Sora Video AI in ChatGPT in Strategy Shift looks like the stronger lead today.
leadStrengths: The story is still fresh enough for a morning-led publish.
leadRisks: Vox is not on the trusted-source list, so the lead needs stronger verification.
The headline has thin keyword signal, which makes generic copy more likely.
The story still reads like a broad industry shift, which can lead to vague content if not tightened.
The headline reads like commentary or interpretation, so it needs source verification before becoming the lead.
backupStrengths: The Information is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
The headline has enough AI-specific signal to support strong downstream content.
product update stories are easier to explain clearly than broad industry-shift headlines.
backupRisks: The story is aging out of the ideal morning-news window.
